mnemonics: Super Tools: Smart Assistants for Complex Tasks
Team Mates: Robots that Work Together for Our Benefit
Tele-Bots: Remote Controlled Robots for Diverse Tasks
Social Robots: Robots that Interact with Humans for Social Benefits
Active Appliances: Intelligent Machines for Everyday Tasks
keyPoints: Supertools are AI-powered tools that automate complex tasks.
Teammates refer to robots that collaborate with humans for mutual benefit.
Tele-bots are remote-controlled robots that can perform various tasks.
Social robots interact with humans to provide social benefits and companionship.
Active appliances are intelligent machines that can learn and adapt to human needs.
Human-Centred AI aims to design systems that prioritise human needs and well-being.
Intelligent agents can be designed to learn and improve over time.
Designing intelligent agents requires considering various factors such as context, intentions, and goals.
Social robots can learn from humans and improve their interactions over time.
Active appliances can be used to monitor and improve human health and well-being.
